properties.entry: select LANDING_ROW_ID from ODS_BACKFILL.DIM_AGENT where AGENT_ID_SOURCE = ? and VALID_FROM < ? order by LANDING_ROW_ID ASC;
select ROW_ID, VALID_FROM from LANDING.PROD_API_MANAGER where ID = ? and VALID_FROM < ? order by ROW_ID ASC;
select LANDING_ROW_ID from ODS_BACKFILL.DIM_AGENT where LANDING_ROW_ID=? and VALID_FROM < ?;
select ROW_ID from LANDING.PROD_API__MANAGER where ROW_ID =? and VALID_FROM < ?;

select property_id, a.property_name as property_name, sum(engagement_red) as total_red, sum(engagement_green) as total_green, round(iff(total_red + total_green = 0, 1, total_green / (total_green + total_red)), 3) as "averageScore" from integration.realpage__engagement_metrics b left join ods.dim_property a on a.is_active=1 and a.property_id = b.property_id where property_id in (?) and date between ? and ? group by property_id, property_name order by property_name;
